First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-bodyXLargeEmphasis css-uicbqd" id="mobileFiltersOverlayTitle">Filtre</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-bodyXLargeEmphasis css-uicbqd">Enhetsleder</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="c-hlXbQp" id="jobad-cta-save" placeholder="ola.nordmann@jobbpost.no" spellcheck="false" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Element has outline:none which may hide focus indicator

<span aria-hidden="true" data-aria-hidden="true" data-radix-focus-guard="" style="outline: none; opacity: 0; position: fixed; pointer-events: none;" tabindex="0"></span>
Provide alternative focus styling if removing default outline

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (1 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 1 pages]
Avvik: 8 | Bestått: 0
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1 (×1 across article pages)

<h2 class="c-bhakit c-bhakit-eDxmou-variant-link c-bhakit-heqqZn-align-start">Jobbsøking</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label (×1 across article pages)

<nav class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 MuiBreadcrumbs-root css-oz7lkh"><ol class="MuiBreadcrumbs-ol css-nhb8h9"><li class="MuiBreadcrumbs-li"><a class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-inh
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['a'] (×1 across article pages)

<ul class="c-eScFl c-eScFl-ihaCEut-css"><a aria-label="homepage" class="c-PJLV c-PJLV-bHwuwj-color-false c-PJLV-cIdiJW-underlined-false c-PJLV-eNNUQD-border-false c-ifhuqL" data-radix-collection-item=
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×29 across article pages)

<a class="c-PJLV c-PJLV-jChwAb-color-nav c-PJLV-cIdiJW-underlined-false c-PJLV-eNNUQD-border-false c-PJLV-ikiwSBi-css c-ifhuqL" data-radix-collection-item="" href="https://jobbland.ai" rel="noopener"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.7 Synlig fokus (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.7 (2.4.7 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Element has outline:none which may hide focus indicator (×2 across article pages)

<span aria-hidden="true" data-aria-hidden="true" data-radix-focus-guard="" style="outline: none; opacity: 0; position: fixed; pointer-events: none;" tabindex="0"></span>
Provide alternative focus styling if removing default outline
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation (×1 across article pages)

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

aria-describedby references non-existent ID: 'radix-:R1db6H2:' (×1 across article pages)

<div aria-describedby="radix-:R1db6H2:" aria-labelledby="radix-:R1db6H1:" class="c-jCztWZ c-jCztWZ-ibbPRjq-css" data-state="open" id="radix-:R1db6:" role="dialog" style="pointer-events: auto;" tabinde
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

python checker.py https://jobbsafari.no --max-pages 16 --format html
